title: Pack Zero
description: A kitchen sink pack for a complete modded experience with over 400 mods, despite the mod count Pack Zero is a performant and stable pack made possible with decades of rigorous testing under hazardous conditions by our resident hamsters.
body:
A kitchen sink quilt pack made for those who like to wonder what if I just like pressed that download all button? There's never too many mods.

In my pursuit of a way to find a more impactful way of story telling I have been working on a Modpack for a while but it will take quite a bit of time and effort. A part of the process is to make sure mods work together well without causing too many issues for the players and its news to nobody mods really don't like each other and are quite the fragile creatures, they can crash even if you breathe wrong around them. And so I made this kitchen sink pack to put all the mods I could find together to do intensive testing and what better lab rats than the players : P In short the pack is a testing ground for an upcoming pack.
I will be taking suggestions on the git repo. It can be anything, really any stupid idea that you think would be fun to have in the pack or any mod/datapack you'd like to see in the pack.

RECOMMENDED RAM : 5 - 7 Gb
Hop onto our Discord Server.




A better list with links to pages is on the way.

Current Total Count : 400 mods
